intentSynonyms: fetch a single messages in telegram
view one specific messages in telegram
get messages from a chat in telegram
description: Get message history for a conversation. Returns messages in reverse chronological order. Use offset_id to paginate (pass the oldest message ID from the previous page). Pass peer_id=0 or omit it to read Saved Messages.

peer_id.description: Peer ID of the conversation (user ID, chat ID, or channel ID). Use 0 for Saved Messages.

limit.description: Number of messages to return (default 20, max 100)

offset_id.description: Message ID to start from for pagination (returns messages before this ID)
